title: Appearance Registry Architecture — 17 Registries + Layer Stack Foundation

changes.title: _makeRegistry() factory function
changes.description: Added _makeRegistry(spec) — a factory that produces immutable registry objects with a consistent shape: { id, version, entries[], getById(id), listIds() }. All 17 appearance registries are created via this factory, ensuring uniform lookup API and Object.freeze() immutability.

changes.title: applyLayerStack() — central layer dispatch stub
changes.description: Added applyLayerStack(element, layers, ctx) — the future central dispatcher for rendering layer stacks from registry entries onto DOM elements. Currently a diagnostic stub. Group A-G layer type handlers will be implemented in v1.0.0.5+ as appearance decorators become functional.

changes.title: RING_REGISTRY
changes.description: Wraps existing STYLE_RING_PRESETS (14 entries: none, ring-glow, ring-pulse, ring-fire, ring-neon, ring-aura, ring-spin, ring-rainbow, ring-particles, ring-gold, ring-ice, ring-plasma, ring-void, ring-crystal) into the unified registry format with empty layer stacks for future layer-based customisation.

changes.title: BADGE_REGISTRY (8 entries)
changes.description: none, dot, star, crown, verified, flame, heart, diamond — all stubs. Badge rendering implementation in v1.0.0.5.

changes.title: OUTLINE_REGISTRY, GLOW_REGISTRY
changes.description: OUTLINE_REGISTRY: none, solid, double, gradient, dashed-anim, inner-rim, outer-rim (7 entries). GLOW_REGISTRY: none, soft, strong, pulse, flicker, halo, bloom (7 entries). Both stubs — rendering in v1.0.0.6.

changes.title: BUBBLE_SHAPE_REGISTRY, BUBBLE_EFFECT_REGISTRY
changes.description: BUBBLE_SHAPE: default, pill, square, minimal, cloud, speech (6 entries). BUBBLE_EFFECT: none, shimmer, sparkle, ripple, glow-breathe, holographic (6 entries). Both stubs — rendering in v1.0.0.7.

changes.title: ROW_STYLE_REGISTRY, HEADER_GEOMETRY_REGISTRY, INPUT_STYLE_REGISTRY
changes.description: ROW_STYLE: default, compact, spacious, card, ghost, minimal (6 entries). HEADER_GEOMETRY: default, rounded, sharp, wave, diagonal, arch (6 entries). INPUT_STYLE: default, pill, glass, sharp, minimal, neon (6 entries). All stubs — room appearance implementation in v1.0.0.10+.

changes.title: COVER_PRESET_REGISTRY, COVER_ANIM_REGISTRY
changes.description: COVER_PRESET: none, gradient, solid, mesh, noise, image (6 entries). COVER_ANIM: none, shimmer, flow, pulse, rotate, sparkle (6 entries). Stubs — cover animation system in v1.0.0.16.

changes.title: PARTICLE_PRESET_REGISTRY
changes.description: 8 entries: none, sparks, snow, bubbles, stars, confetti, fire, matrix. Stubs — particle engine in v1.0.0.13.

changes.title: ROOM_THEME_REGISTRY, LOCAL_THEME_REGISTRY, UI_SHAPE_REGISTRY
changes.description: ROOM_THEME: default, dark, light, midnight, sakura, ember, arctic, neon-city (8 entries). LOCAL_THEME: 12 entries matching existing style themes. UI_SHAPE: default, rounded-sm, rounded-lg, sharp, pill, mixed (6 entries). All stubs.

changes.title: PROFILE_FRAME_REGISTRY, PROFILE_GEOMETRY_REGISTRY
changes.description: PROFILE_FRAME: none, circle, hexagon, square, diamond, star (6 entries). PROFILE_GEOMETRY: default, offset-tl, offset-tr, oversized, compact, float (6 entries). Stubs.

changes.title: APPEARANCE_REGISTRIES master index
changes.description: Added APPEARANCE_REGISTRIES — a frozen object keyed by registry.id containing all 17 registries. Allows O(1) registry lookup by ID: APPEARANCE_REGISTRIES['ring'].getById('ring-glow').
